rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Who is the Kimwolf Botmaster “Dort”?
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/21
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '99.241.112.24'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*gmail.com*'
            - '*ocdsb.ca*'
            - '*osint.industries*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 99.241.112.24 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Who_is_the_Kimwolf_Botmaster__"; sid:7367037; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 99.241.112.24 any (msg:"CDB APEX Who_is_the_Kimwolf_Botmaster__"; sid:2066021; rev:1;)
